title: T-003 — lp_genealogy table migration
prompt:
# T-003 — lp_genealogy table migration

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §5.3, §11.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Create `lp_genealogy` table to log split/merge/consume/output/quarantine_move events with parent/child LP linkage.

## Implementation contract
Add `packages/db/src/schema/lp-genealogy.ts` with columns per §5.3: id, tenant_id, parent_lp_id, child_lp_id, operation_type ENUM ('split','merge','consume','output','quarantine_move','adjustment'), quantity, operation_date, wo_id, grn_id, user_id, reason_code, reason_text, is_reversed (default false), context_jsonb. Add cycle-prevention DB trigger or document deferral to T-011 indexes (use simple non-recursive constraint here: child_lp_id != parent_lp_id when both non-null).

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/src/schema/lp-genealogy.ts [create]
- packages/db/migrations/0NN_lp_genealogy.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/lp-genealogy.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the migration runs, when `\d lp_genealogy` is inspected, then all PRD §5.3 columns are present.
2. Given an INSERT with parent_lp_id = child_lp_id, when committed, then DB raises a CHECK violation.
3. Given an operation_type 'invalid' is inserted, when committed, then DB raises an enum violation.

## Test strategy
- RED: lp-genealogy.test.ts asserts CHECK violation and enum rejection.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test lp-genealogy`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow self-loops (parent==child).
- Do not add recursive triggers in this task (T-011/V-WH-TRACE-002 deferred).
- Do not store full payload here — use context_jsonb for op-specific metadata.

pipeline_inputs.details: Drizzle schema + SQL migration with op-type enum and cycle-prevention CHECK (parent != child). Indexes (parent_lp_id, operation_date DESC) deferred to T-011.
